nodes.name: Rufous-headed tanager
nodes.summary: The rufous-headed tanager (Hemithraupis ruficapilla) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is endemic to Brazil. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest, subtropical or tropical moist montane forest, and heavily degraded former forest. References
nodes.shortSummary: The rufous-headed tanager (Hemithraupis ruficapilla) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is endemic to Brazil.

nodes.name: Rufous-headed tanager
nodes.summary: Rufous-headed tanager（Hemithraupis ruficapilla）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Rufous-headed tanager。

nodes.name: Hemithraupis
nodes.summary: Hemithraupis（Hemithraupis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Guira tanager、Rufous-headed tanager、Yellow-backed tanager。
